item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p04","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer immediately refuses adding another confirmation person at the sorting table, explicitly identifies the repeated pattern across Monday through Wednesday of downstream manual review/intercept/inspection gates, and reframes today’s request as another terminal manual patch. It moves the action upstream to find the first failure point in batch generation, entry, flow, or sortability and assigns ownership for structural repair. No requested local manual gate is supplied anywhere."}
